PCOC 2017

Published:
2017 by Origami USA
Pages:
116
Binding:
Paperback
Language:
English

Find it on ebay

Skill Level From simple to complex
Clear diagrams? Varies
Tinted diagrams (to show 2 sides of paper)? Varies
Photos of completed models? No
Is there indication to the model size resulting from size of starting paper? Varies
Are the models "Pure" origami (From a single square - no cuts)? Varies

Overall Impression

This is the model collection book of The Pacific Coast OrigamiUSA Conference (PCOC), which has been held at various locations along the West Coast of North America. It takes place in odd-numbered years in the fall.

The book is a big compilation of various models from multiple designers. Difficulty and diagramming quality vary.

Buy from: Origami USA

There are 37 Origami Designs in PCOC 2017:
